entry.title: Driving To The Grassland With My Family

link.title: Driving To The Grassland With My Family

entry.content:
On the occasion of the National Day, I remembered taking my children to travel. The most unforgettable thing for me was that our family went to the grassland.


Plants on the grassland of Zhangbei


Previously, I never thought that one day our family would appear on the prairie. It was really a trip to go.

Before we went to the grassland, our understanding of the grassland was flat. When we went there, the grassland was three-dimensional. For children, the grassland brings them infinite freshness, happiness and insight, as if they are in a never-before-to-be. I think this special travel experience will play an important role in the growth of children. ‍ ‍ ‍ ‍ ‍ ‍ ‍ ‍ ‍ ‍‍‍‍‍‍‍‍‍‍‍‍‍‍‍‍‍‍‍‍‍‍

Overlooking Zhangbei County on the Zhangbei Grassland ‍‍‍


1. Fresh‍‍‍


Before I arrived at the grassland, I asked the man in the grassland what I needed to pay attention to when going to the grassland. He said there was nothing to pay attention to, that is, there were few people and cars on the road.

He was right. There were few vehicles we encountered along the way. For a long time, it seemed that we were the only one driving under the sky, and we suddenly felt much smaller.

As soon as the car stopped, the children couldn’t wait to get out of the car. When they got on the grassland, they ran away like a deer, and I chased after them reluctantly. Tired of running, the children stopped to rest, looked here for a while, looked over there for a while, asked what this was, and asked what it was for a while. Seeing a large flock of sheep from a distance, they ran over excitedly. I chased after it again.

“Dad, look, the one with the biggest head is the leader. There really is a leader! The other sheep have to follow it.” The children seemed to have discovered the mystery.

It was also the first time I saw this situation with my own eyes.

“Will the sheep run away?” I asked the shepherd.

“Run, why don’t you run?” His voice was thick and powerful.


2. Happiness‍‍‍


“Hey, Dad!” The children stood far away on the high ground of the grassland and shouted at me. The sound was mixed with the wind of the grassland, which was particularly loud.

Seeing the herdsmen leading some horses, the children shouted to ride a horse.

How can you not ride a horse when you come to the grassland?

We talked about the price with the herdsmen, and the children and I rode horses on the grassland.

The herdsmen enthusiastically told us to walk slowly for a while and then run faster.

The horse started running, too bumpy, and the crotch was a little unbearable. However, the children were not afraid. Instead, they were very excited and couldn’t help shouting “Drive! Drive! Drive!”. This is probably learned from TV, and now it comes in use.


3. insight‍‍‍


The so-called insight is to see and understand, that is, a kind of life experience.

During the trip, children enrich their knowledge by observing and asking questions.

Suddenly, the child asked me, “Dad, what are those symbols? It’s similar to the one on the money.”

“That’s Mongolian. Isn’t it like a picture?” I was surprised by the child’s ability to observe and connect things.

Later, when the children saw the Mongolian characters that could be seen everywhere, they were surprised and interested in them. They compared the Mongolian characters and Chinese characters they saw along the way, and actually started their research and discussion. This is probably the purpose of “ traveling thousands of miles”, that is, to increase knowledge.

“If you want to buy osmanthus and wine, it’s not like a youth tour.”

Our family took a self-driving trip to the prairie. The journey was long and hard, but we gained a special travel experience and precious memories of a happy family.
entry.summary: On the occasion of the National Day, I remembered taking my children to travel. The most unforgettable thing for me was that our family went to the grassland.

entry.title: Memorize Vocabulary Easily
entry.content:
This afternoon, Watermelon Tan came to tell me that she couldn’t memorize words with her cousin, because she only memorized one or two words in the afternoon. I didn’t believe there was such a thing. I called her cousin to come and ask, and it was true.

I know, but if a child can’t learn well, it’s not because he’s stupid, but because he can’t do it. So, I took the simplest word card and asked her cousin if she could. She nodded timidly and whispered, “be”. Then I dropped the card and said to her, “Can you spell?” She whispered again, “b-e, be”. I said, “Very good, isn’t it? How simple it is!” Then, I picked up another “give” word card, and she shook her head, so I changed to a “dish” word card, and she shook her head again. At this time, I stopped and looked at her and said, “I can read and write! Pay attention to how I memorize words. She was very focused at this time.

I took back the word card of “give”, drew a horizontal line under “gi” with a pencil, and asked her, “Can you memorize this? It’s as simple as the “be” just now. She nodded. Then, I drew a horizontal line under “ve” and said to her, “The last “e” is usually not pronounced, only the “v” sound. Can you get it?” She nodded again. So, I further said, “Since both “gi” and “ve” can be memorized and connected, will “give” also do it?” She nodded vigorously again. At this time, she seemed to have sensed something. I further said, “Since “give” can be memorized, in the same way, “dish” only needs to memorize “di” and “sh”.” She seems to have some enlightenment. I picked up “classmate” again and said, “This is a combination of the words “class” and “mate”. “class” is the class, and “mate” is a partner. Isn’t it a classmate in the class?” Then, I picked up “together” and said, “This is a combination of the three words “to”, “get” and “her”. “to” means to go, “get” is to get, and “her” is her. Together, it means “go to get her”. Isn’t that “together”?” Speaking of this, she has already smiled. Finally, I said, “Everyone can memorize vocabulary easily! Take it and memorize it again.” So they went back and continued to memorize words. I believe this method will be helpful to them.

I didn’t create this method. I have seen relevant articles and videos on the Internet, which mean that a school in the United States teaches children to memorize words according to syllables. First of all, the pronunciation should be accurate, which is the premise, and then spell it according to the syllable. It doesn’t matter if the spelling is wrong. It is easy to write it down after repeating it several times.

I once thought that Chinese characters have radicals. In fact, English also has. The syllables are radicals, but I haven’t seen anyone say that, but you can take them as an analogy.

If I had known this method of memorizing words from the beginning, I would have been a different person now, and I probably wouldn’t have been to Huazhong University of Science and Technology, so I wouldn’t have met my current wife. But there is no if in history. No, I will still be who I am now, because the method is just a tool, and the most important thing is to be ambitious.

Just because of my ambition, I am still not satisfied with my current English level. Although I often read English books, I am still a rookie and can’t read English books without barriers. I have read the relevant article that to reach this level, the number of words should be about 20,000. This is the reason why it is difficult to improve English at a level, and it is also the biggest obstacle to proficiency in English. I would like to work hard to achieve it in the rest of my life.

I wrote this article not to advocate this method, because there is a saying in the fishing world: “Water has no momentum, and fishing has no fixed method.” Fishing is this way, and so is true of memorizing words. If a person can constantly explore, continuously improve and integrate under the guidance of the superior heart, and be intoxicated and enjoy it tirelessly, I believe he will be able to memorize words like chopping melons and vegetables.
entry.summary: This afternoon, Watermelon Tan came to tell me that she couldn’t memorize words with her cousin, because she only memorized one or two words in the afternoon. I didn’t believe there was such a thing. I called her cousin to come and ask, and it was true.

entry.title: Can’t hide it secretly
entry.content:
When I was a kid, I was often said to be a “Black Frog”. Now, my two kids are only thin but not black.

When I wanted my kids to eat well, Watermelon Tan said that he wanted to lose weight, while Mango Kun straightened his stomach, lifted his clothes and exposed his belly, and bulged into a ball to show you.

Why don’t kids like to eat? How can kids be willing to eat? What can you eat to help your kid grow up? These problems often make me worried about kids’s malnutrition, poor resistance, low growth, rickets, X/O-shaped legs… I found that worry can only increase troubles, and I have to find a way to guide and recuperate slowly.

The way I think is to make pancakes for the kids.

Take a soup bowl, add 50g of whole wheat flour, buckwheat flour, corn flour and soybean powder respectively, twist five or six circles of Himalayan powder salt, add 200g of milk powder, stir evenly, beat four native eggs, add a little honey, stir evenly again, and cover with a plate for later use. Cut a carrot, put the carrot slices into the cooking machine, take away the plate, pour the carrot dregs into the dough, and stir well again, so that the noodles are reconciled.

Next, you can set the pot and light a low fire. Take the best Mediterranean virgin olive oil and pour it into the pot. Don’t put too much oil, just dip it all over the bottom of the pot. When the oil temperature rises, you can pour a small pinch of dough into the pot. When the bottom of the dough is formed, you can turn it over with a spatula. When turning the surface, you need to pay attention to it. Be especially careful to shovel it from the bottom of the dough little by little with a shovel. Don’t worry. When the dough is all on the shovel, quickly turn it up and down, and then press the flat ball with a shovel. Take your time. Don’t be in a hurry. Press the flat ball evenly little by little, and let it spread out as thin as possible into a circle or love. It is crispy and easy to eat. When the bottom surface is formed again, turn it over, then flatten it and flatten it. After several times, you can take it out of the pan, pour the pancake into the plate, and just cover the whole plate. Such pancake is the best state.

I often give pancakes to kids like this, so I can explain how to make it in detail. The key lies not in the ingredients themselves, but in balanced nutrition: starch, protein, fat, dietary fiber and vitamins.

They usually can’t finish a whole pancake. I will make an appointment with them: eat half and leave the remaining half to me. In this way, I ate all the pancakes with my two kids.

At first, the kids will ask doubtfully, “What is the orange scum in this cake?” I smiled and said honestly, “Carrots, in addition, I also added milk powder, eggs and honey.” They all pretended to be angry and said, “Hmm~! Why did you do this? You vicious father!” I answered them happily: “For your healthy growth, I can’t hide it secretly!”
entry.summary: When I was a kid, I was often said to be a “Black Frog”. Now, my two kids are only thin but not black.

entry.title: Dad Forgot
entry.content:
While you were asleep, I sneaked into your current room and saw the light falling on your face from the cracks of the curtains, and your eyebrows seemed to wrinkle slightly. When I stood in front of your bed and looked at your quiet and sleeping face, a strong feeling of remorse hit my heart.

Just now, I was reading in your original room and heard a sound, and then I saw you opened the door and came in barefoot, standing in front of me, and saying something to me. But I didn’t hear it clearly, so I asked what you wanted to say. You were muttering something again, and you seemed to be a little scared. I asked you two or three times, but I couldn’t hear you clearly. Then you went out and went back to the room. I immediately chased after you and saw you sitting quietly on the bed, as if you were a little awake, but you didn’t remember what you had just said. I immediately understood that it was the mental pressure I caused to you.

For tomorrow’s exam, I asked you to take three mock exams today, one in Chinese and two in mathematics. You did one more math, just because you were careless, you could have got a full score, but it was only 80. So I asked you to take the exam again and correct your carelessness. Later, I told you about the problem of “hundred monks and white steamed buns”, and I cleverly taught you the solution of the unary linear equations. The night before yesterday, I also told you about another problem of “chicken and rabbits in the same cage” and taught you the solution of the ternary linear equations. In order to explain it clearly, I wrote down three pages of draft paper. That night, we never fought together until three o’clock in the morning. In the process of explanation, I also shouted at you from time to time. I can’t wait to transfer what I have learned all my life to you without reservation in the way of “imparting internal skills” in martial arts dramas. Later, I saw that you couldn’t stand it, so I asked you to go to bed first. Across the door, I heard you crying bitterly inside, and my tears flowed down. If I can exchange zero points for not being wronged, I will be willing. No matter how many slaps I am given, I will not hesitate.

In order to help you, I even passed on my method and experience of taking the college entrance examination to you: write the answer on the answer sheet, carefully check that there is no problem, then copy it to the test paper, and remind yourself to write neatly while copying, so that the marking teacher can enjoy the eyes.

Now think about it, I’m too smart. It’s not your problem, but Dad forgot.

Dad forgot that you are still just a ten-year-old girl.

Dad forgot that this was just a trivial primary school exam.

Dad forgot that the most important thing for a person to learn is to have an upward mind, not to pursue the fixed learning method.

Dad forgot that your life and study should be explored and created by yourself, no matter what the result is.

Dad forgot that life is a long run. Take your time and don’t worry.

Dad forgot that Dad loves you just because you are my child, not because of your grades.

Dad forgot that Dad’s most important responsibility is to earn money to support the family and ensure the safety of everyone in the family.

Dad wrote these words not only for repentance, but also to remind myself from time to time that there will be more exams in the future to avoid Dad forgetting them again.
entry.summary: While you were asleep, I sneaked into your current room and saw the light falling on your face from the cracks of the curtains, and your eyebrows seemed to wrinkle slightly. When I stood in front of your bed and looked at your quiet and sleeping face, a strong feeling of remorse hit my heart.

entry.title: Cultivate Your Kids’ Upward Mind
entry.content:
During breakfast, I suddenly asked Watermelon Tan, “How many points did you get in the English test this time?” Although I am not confident, I have hope.

When she told me sadly that she only got 83 points in the exam, I was surprised to hear it. I thought that since she began to learn English in the third grade of the school, she started from failing in her grades, slowly experienced her sixties and seventies and now reached more than 80s. It was not easy. What I saw was a rising star of hope. This feeling was much better than experiencing 100 points at the beginning, to more than nineties, then to more than eighties… So I smiled and said to her, “Yes, there is progress, which proves that our method is effective (the so-called method is just to prepare some word cards for her).” She happily told me that English teacher Li praised her for her progress many times this semester. I said, “Of course. When a teacher sees a student’s grades rising little by little, it’s like a farmer’s joy when he sees the crops in the field growing up little by little. The joy is unparalleled.”

So, I immediately sent a message to Mr. Li in English:

“Hi, good morning, Mr. Li. I’m the kid’s father. I learned from her that I got 80 points in this English exam. I’m very happy to hear that. She told me many times that you praised her for her progress. Among the teachers I have met, you are the only one who encourages her. I sincerely thank you for your help. I wish you a happy and healthy life.

I think that a teacher, in the face of a student with poor grades, can stand the test of education if he can not be angry and patiently encourage him and wait for students to slowly improve their learning ability. For such a teacher, I will never hesitate to praise him.

Mr. Li immediately replied:

“Last week, I also talked to my head teacher, Mrs. Qin, about her situation. We all think that she has learning ability and good learning habits and attitude. As long as she maintains this good habit and enthusiasm, we all believe that she can get better and better in learning. Let’s work together.:shake_hands:”

Yes, as Mr. Li said, as long as you maintain good habits and enthusiasm, kids will get better and better in learning. I suddenly understood that this is to have an upward mind, isn’t it? Any person who achieves something depends on self-study, and the source of self-study is his upward mind. In other words, if a person has an upward mind, he will study by himself, so that he will find his interests and strengths, strengthen his ambitions, and be able to continuously absorb energy from self-study, converge in himself, continuously improve, integrate, self-contained, self-use, use freely, and explore the unknown. In this way, he can go from the ordinary road to success. The so-called success is in the process that one found and realized the value and mission in his or her life.

I think it was extremely painful to get started with English at first. This kind of pain came out later when I studied a computer course called Data Structure in college, but it was far less painful than the introduction to English. This kind of pain was only limited to the beginning, and later it was much smoother. Now that I think about it, the root of it is that I always have an upward mind, so that I am not afraid of any difficulties on the road of self-study, like a seed breaking the ground.

Looking at Watermelon Tan’s concentrating on her favorite books, I finally figured out: “There is a long way to go.” Learning is not to teach knowledge for a while, but to keep looking for a long time. As a parent, if you want to educate your kids well, you must first cultivate your kids’ upward mind.
entry.summary: During breakfast, I suddenly asked Watermelon Tan, “How many points did you get in the English test this time?” Although I am not confident, I have hope.

entry.title: My Two Kids
entry.content:
My two kids are a girl and a boy. The girl is an elder sister and the boy is a younger brother. My daughter is ten years old and is about to enter the fifth grade, while my son is six and a half years old and will be promoted to the first grade.

When it comes to my two kids, people often say to me, such as “It’s good to have both a girl and a boy.”, or “It’s really blessed to have both a girl and a boy.” My father also said to me, “You are lucky.” He has two sons, my brother and me.

This is human nature. At first, I thought so, but as I grew older, I didn’t think so. Kids, girls or boys, are a kind of fate and a responsibility or mission entrusted to me. Girls give me girls’ fate and responsibility, while boys give me boys’ fate and responsibility.

On October 12, 2013, my daughter was born in the Maternal and Infant Health Center in Putuo District, Shanghai. That day was cloudless and blue, and I was excited and a little awe-inspiring. Later, when we were discharged from the hospital, we took a group photo at the gate of the health center on Changshou Road, including my mother, my mother-in-law, my wife holding my daughter and me. At that moment, my heart suddenly had a kind of autumnal sadness, sighing that the photo would soon become ten years ago, twenty years ago and so on. My wife asked me to name our daughter. So I looked up the Internet and looked through the dictionary. Only one of the words “tan” can touch my heart the most. I hope my kid’s future life will be smoother. The names we prepared before dispersed like fallen leaves in autumn. Later, because my daughter liked to eat watermelon, we all called her “Watermelon Tan”.

When my wife was pregnant with Watermelon Tan for three months, she told me that she dreamed of a little snake biting her finger. I have heard of fetal dreams, but I don’t know what it means. Sometimes I feel my stupidity and awe of life.

On December 12, 2017, my son was also born in the Maternal and Infant Health Hospital in Putuo District, Shanghai, but in the new hospital area on Tongpu Road. At midnight that day, my wife was fighting on Double 12 when she suddenly told me that she had a slight pain. Intuition, responsibility and love for her made me take her to the health center immediately. An hour or two later, I witnessed the birth of my son in a separate delivery room. Because the second kid was born naturally, the time experienced was only a quarter of an hour. I looked up the Internet and looked through the dictionary again. When I saw the word “Kun”, I was shocked. My wife preferred “Hui”. I said, “If our daughter is ‘Tan’ while our son is not ‘Kun’, there will be regrets.” Therefore, the word “Hui” and the name we had prepared before floated away like snowflakes in winter. Later, because my son loved to eat mangoes, we all called him “Mango Kun”.

Kids are like seedlings. We parents don’t worry about their growth. What we worry about is safety and education. Safety includes health, avoiding harm, etc. The purpose of education is to enable them to survive in society in the future.

Watermelon Tan is a “full-term baby”. She rarely got sick before the age of ten, and only stayed in the hospital once due to pneumonia during the kindergarten. Not long ago, she was hospitalized because of low platelets. Generally, when kids have this kind of blood problem, parents are often panicked and worried. I consulted relevant articles at home and abroad on the Internet, and had a little understanding of this disease. I went to consult the experts of Wuhan Kids’s Hospital and Union Hospital, and made a decision to reject the doctor’s suggestion of bone marrow aspiration, and believed that her disease was probably caused by infection, because the injection of gamma globulin was effective, which was a key evidence. Of course, I thought environmental factors were also worth paying attention to. She liked handicrafts and painting. She was often exposed to colored clay and paints. She was still young and did not know the importance of cleaning and personal hygiene. In addition, her room was docorated and placed with new furniture. Her skin was often itchy this year, which was likely to be related to the environment in the room. I immediately made the decision to adjust the room with her for a period of time, so that she could restore her health and life in a new environment.

Compared with Watermelon Tan, Mango Kun is weak and sickly. He was hospitalized for mycoplasma pneumonia soon after he was born, and later became a regular visitor to the hospital, suffering from pneumonia on average once a year. I also had pneumonia in the second year of junior school. At that time, when I was treated in the People’s Hospital of Dongxihu District, the doctor once said to me earnestly, “It’s better to break the root of this disease, otherwise it is easy to repeat.” Now I think about it, Mango Kun’s repeated so much must be because he couldn’t break the root. A few years ago, he suffered from the disease and had a fever of 41 degrees centigrade. He convulsed and talked nonsense, but the hospital told us that there was no bed. In great anxiety, thanks to the help of an old classmate, my son was able to be hospitalized and overcome the difficulties. It’s hard to think that the kid was sick at that time.

As a parent, as long as the kid grows up healthily and safely, what are the other problems? Parenthood is not only the journey of accompanying kids to grow together, but also the process of exploring the meaning of self-life.

When I’m writing this article, my two kids are playing with toys in bed. Watermelon Tan takes Mango Kun and they play different cartoon roles while playing. They are kind and love each other, and there are bursts of laughter. I suddenly understand something. Isn’t this their extremely happy kidhood? It shakes each other while accompanying each other all their lives.

At that moment, it turned into eternity in my heart, which made me think all the time of my two kids.
entry.summary: My two kids are a girl and a boy. The girl is an elder sister and the boy is a younger brother. My daughter is ten years old and is about to enter the fifth grade, while my son is six and a half years old and will be promoted to the first grade.

entry.title: The Power of The Father
entry.content:
Last summer, I read a strange book. The sentence written in the book, “Life is self-made, and blessings are sought by oneself” touched my heart. This book is “The Four Lessons of Fan”, which mentions at the beginning:

“If you have the power to hang the pen, it will pour out, and it will be refined and wonderful. Han Wengong’s “Sacrifice Twelve Langs” is also; the article has also been out of the manuscript for a long time, changing day by day and month, and it has been refined for decades to be the final one, and Ouyang Wen Zhonggong’s “Longgang Qian Table” is also.”

– Xiu Ouyang《The Gravestone of Longgang》

I remember that I learned Han Yu’s “Sacrifice to Twelve Langs” in my second year of high school, and the scene of Mr. Liu reading the text with deep affection came to my mind. Thinking of Ouyang Xiu’s “Zui Weng Pavilion” and “Preface to the Five Dynasties of Shi Lingguan”, who had learned in the first year of high school, Mr. Feng’s resonant and powerful voice seemed to ring in my ears again. Perhaps Ouyang Xiu’s “Drunken Man’s Intention is Not Wine” is liked by more people, but I prefer to read his “Preface to the Biography of the Five Dynasties of Shiling Officials”. In it, “the husband’s disaster often accumulates in the slight, while wisdom and courage is trapped in drowning” has become my philosophy of life.

I read in another book that Ouyang Xiu’s best article is The Theory of Friends, and I think his best article is Longgang Qian Table. Since I read “Longgang Qian Table” this year, every time I read this article, I often cry like rain.

“The Preface to the Four Precepts” sincerely don’t bully me!

More precisely, the second paragraph of “Longgang Qian Table” infected me, and it will definitely infect more parents, so as to benefit more children and contribute more value to society in the future. This is the motivation for me to write Father’s Power.

Why was Ouyang Xiu able to become a high official, one of the eight masters of the Tang and Song Dynasties, and Su Shi’s Bo Le? You can find the answer from Longgang Qian Table. Ouyang Xiu lost his father at the age of four. It can be said that there is almost no father in Ouyang Xiu’s memory, but it can have an impact on Ouyang Xiu for a lifetime. What kind of person is his father? In the article, his mother’s wife said:

Your father is an official, honest and easy to give, and welcome guests. Although his salary is small, he often doesn’t have any excess, saying, ‘Don’t think it’s because I’m tired.’

– Xiu Ouyang《The Gravestone of Longgang》

I thought that when Ouyang Xiu wrote “The Theory of Friends”, he must have imagined his father in his mind. He called people like his father the party of gentlemen, and when he was an official, he was also a gentleman no matter how big his official position was.

Mrs. Tai then told Ouyang Xiu two stories about his father:

（1）

When you are old, you must cry and say, ‘It is better to sacrifice abundantly than to raise thinly.’ Between the royal wine and food, he cried again and said, “In the past, it was often insufficient, but now there is more than enough, how can it be!”

– Xiu Ouyang《The Gravestone of Longgang》

The ancients said: “The tree wants to be quiet, but the wind does not stop, and the son wants to be raised, but the relatives do not wait.” Ouyang Xiu’s father has a deep understanding, and his filial piety must have infected Ouyang Xiu, so that he has a supporting power on the road of life.

His father’s words also changed my behavior. When I go to my parents’ place later, I always want to bring something to them. No matter whether the things I bring are expensive or cheap, as long as they like it, I will feel a little relieved. I also told my wife what Ouyang Xiu’s father said, and I also supported her to show filial piety.

（2）

Your father is an official, and he has tasted the official letter at night, and repeatedly abolished and sighed. When I asked him, he said, ‘I don’t want to survive in this prison!’ I said, ‘Can I ask for life?’ He said: ‘If you ask him to be born but you can’t get it, then the dead and I have no hatred; if you ask for it, you will get it! If you have something, you know that you don’t ask for it, but the dead have hatred! The husband often asks for his life, but still loses his death; and the world often asks for his death.’ Looking back on the breast, he hugged you and stood beside you. He sighed and said, ‘The magician said that I was going to die in Xu. To make it clear, I can’t see the son’s standing, and I should tell it in my own words.’

– Xiu Ouyang《The Gravestone of Longgang》

After talking about these two things about her father, Mrs. Tai said something wise:

You encourage it! The husband does not have to be rich, but filial piety; although profit is not rich in things, his heart should be more generous than benevolence. I can’t teach you, this is your father’s ambition.

– Xiu Ouyang《The Gravestone of Longgang》

How did the young Ouyang Xiu react when he heard Mrs. Tai’s words?

Xiu cried and aspired to it, and dare not forget it.

– Xiu Ouyang《The Gravestone of Longgang》

Later, Ouyang Xiu read Su Shi’s words and once said, “I should withdraw this person and make him ahead.” On the one hand, Ouyang cultivates talents, and on the other hand, isn’t it for him and Su Shi to “not hate”? He must have imagined his father in his mind and realized his father’s ambition with practical actions.

This is the power of the father.

I also remembered that my favorite Ouyang Xiu in high school was also mentioned in the “Preface of the Five Dynasties of Shiling Officials”:

“Liang, my enemy is also; King of Yan, I set up, Khitan, and I are brothers, and they all turn against Jin to return to Liang. I hate these three. With you three arrows, you don’t forget your father’s ambition!”

– Xiu Ouyang《Biography of the Five Dynasties of Shiling Officials》

This also expresses Ouyang Xiu’s recognition of this kind of power. They are the same father’s aspirations, but the content is different, and the influence on children is huge and far-reaching.

When I was a child, I often thought, “I have grandma, grandpa and grandma, why don’t I have grandpa?” Later, when I was in college, by chance, my uncle and uncle came to Wujia Mountain. When they were walking on the Fifth Ring Road (now next to Hema Fresh), they somehow talked about my grandfather. I asked my uncle a question: “What kind of person is he (my grandfather)?” I remember that my uncle said to me with a smile after hearing it, “He is a person who can make people laugh.”

The ancients said, “If you have a father, you will have a son.”

The ancients did not deceive me! As a father of two children, I think of the power of this father.
entry.summary: Last summer, I read a strange book. The sentence written in the book, “Life is self-made, and blessings are sought by oneself” touched my heart. This book is “The Four Lessons of Fan”, which mentions at the beginning:

entry.title: Awesome Shell Commands
entry.content:
These are the increasing collection of awesome shell commands, as they help a lot with my computer work. I hope to use these as soon as I need them, and if they can also help you, I will feel happy.

Awesome Shell Commands

Filesystem

Search

Find all files recursively by file types

If you want to move all the files, you can use “-exec” and “-o”. Here is an example of how you can perform the task.


find /data/ -type f \( -name "*.pdf" -o -name "*.epub" -o  -name "*.mobi" -o -name "*.azw3" -o -name "*.txt" \) -exec mv {} books/ \;

Text

Replace

If you want to recursively replace all the words in all files in a directory. Here is an example of how you can perform the task.


# on Mac
export LC_ALL='C'
find . -type f -name "*" -print0 | xargs -0 sed -i ''  -e 's/old/new/g'
entry.summary: These are the increasing collection of awesome shell commands, as they help a lot with my computer work. I hope to use these as soon as I need them, and if they can also help you, I will feel happy.

entry.title: Kuiyonggen Memo
entry.content:
On April 11 of the Year of the Rabbit, the day when Kuiyonggen was registered was also my lunar birthday. Although it was a coincidence, it was also God’s will, which shocked me.

The origin of the name is the online name of my little daughter. When I went to Hong Kong, I saw the word “Kwai Chung”(“Kuiyong”) on several road signs, and the little girl was surprised. Later, I asked the origin of her network name. She just wanted to find a name that began with the letter “k” as the network name and typed it casually with the input method. She added a “gen”(which means “root”) word, so that she felt that the name was better. Suddenly, there was a feeling of “as if there was light”, so I registered the company with this name.

The company began to be operated by me alone. Industrial and commercial establishment and change, tax report registration, annual, quarterly and monthly tax reporting, opening of public accounts, and exchanges between government centers and banks are all my daily work. Although it is hard, I still enjoy it; although it is not profitable, I’m not anxious; although it is just starting, I’m still ambitious.

I have seen some stories of entrepreneurs starting a business, and I was moved by the deeds behind their success. I know that getting rich overnight is a luxury, and it is impossible to become a “unicorn”. These are not the goals of a company like me.

I have seen some stories of entrepreneurs starting a business, and I was moved by the deeds behind their successes. I know that getting rich overnight is a wild wish, and it is impossible to become a “unicorn”. These are not the goals of a company like mine.

“Let kids grow up in love!” This is the goal or mission of our company. If we don’t take this as the goal, we will never do it; on the contrary, we must spare no effort to achieve the goal. Anyone who recognizes our company’s values and strives for this goal is our company’s people, otherwise it is not.

In my opinion, starting a business is like occasionally entering the “Peach Blossom Land”, as Tao Yuanming remembered: “The beginning is extremely narrow, and only one person can pass through it. If you take dozens of steps again, you will suddenly be cheerful.” I used to read this article when I was in school, but I didn’t quite understand it. Now when I reach middle age, it’s my own life. The same is true for entrepreneurship. All entrepreneurs should take the same view.

Tao Yuanming also wrote: “Please refuse any social interactivities and travels. The world is against me. How can I ask for a return?” Under his inspiration, I also “Refuse any social interactivities and travels”, and I also felt that “The world are against me”, but I can’t put forward the kind of the problem like “How can I ask for a return?”.

In the past, when I was working other companies, an entrepreneur once said something to me like that “starting a business is endlessly fun”. At that time, I couldn’t fully understand this sentence. At this time, I was in the process of starting a business, and I deeply thought so. Entrepreneurship can make it easier for people to enter the “Eureka Moment”. The most famous one is probably Archimedes, who suddenly ran out when he was taking a bath and shouted, “Eureka (I found it)!” Eureka!” You can imagine how excited he was when he was the first to solve the problem that had no answer before that era.

I have also entered the Eureka moment, and I have also experienced that wonderful feeling. It is the feeling that drives the progress of human civilization.

Last year’s 39th birthday was spent as usual, and this year is the same. This is what I think. It is not easy for a person to live to the age of 40. In my opinion, 40 is just “self-rebirth” and having “memory of the past life”.

At the age of 40, I was born with Kuiyonggen, evidenced by poetry:

People are like rebirth in middle age.

The old friends cherish the time.

There is the friend fate of meeting by chance.,

Even if there is no news, there is a heart of kindness.

- April 22nd of the Year of the Dragon in Wuhan
entry.summary: On April 11 of the Year of the Rabbit, the day when Kuiyonggen was registered was also my lunar birthday. Although it was a coincidence, it was also God’s will, which shocked me.

entry.title: What I Do
entry.content:
Today is March 20th, a special day. I opened a business-to-public account in Hankou Bank as a corporate legal person, which means that the one-person company I founded can be operated legally.

For this day, I spent almost 6 years.

When I returned to Wuhan from Shanghai in 2018, I had the idea of starting a company. I even submitted an application online, but I couldn’t find the registered address, so I couldn’t do it, adn I put it on hold.

Back to March 20, 2003, why do I remember this day?

Because I didn’t get home until 10 o’clock on the night, more than an hour later than usual. At that time, I was in my senior year of high school, less than 100 days before the college entrance examination. My father suspected that I was in love with some girl and scolded me fiercely.

I was disgusted with my father’s distrust of me. Even if this is true, I want him to trust me. I didn’t admit or defend, but I planted a seed in my heart.

No one wants to be suspected, even for children, let alone a 19-year-old adult.

I failed the college entrance examination that year. Maybe it was the worst one I did. Teachers and classmates all say that my psychological quality is poor, and my parents also think so. But I think this is only one aspect, or even a small aspect.

A child with good grades suddenly got bad grades, perhaps because he found something strange, such as family changes.

I chose to stay and prepare for the next year’s exams, because my father said that he wanted me to go to Wuhan University, and I really wanted to go to a famous school at that time. My cousins have the same expirience. Although I don’t live with them every day, I can also imagine their family environment.

However, in the next year, I was lonely. The previous classmates went to college, but the new classmates were not familiar with me. I often leaned against the horizontal bar by the playground in a daze, admiring the gorgeous sunset. That was the first time I really thought about my future. I knew that as long as I kept studying, I only want to be stable that year. That year, no matter what happened, my parents never criticized me.

In 2004, I was admitted to Huazhong University of Science and Technology as I wished. This was my own choice. Although it was not my father’s wish in those years, he also supported me at that time, because he also began to know this not-standing but powerful university. In that year, Huazhong University of Science and Technology ranked fifth in the country, and Wuhan University was a century-old famous university. My father also began to care about this university.

My university was abandoned. Since college, two words have flashed in my eyes: confusion. This state has lasted for nearly 20 years.

When I first entered college, I found that some people had clear goals: some people were ready to go abroad; some people were going to study for a doctorate; and some people were preparing for employment… I belonged to the kind of person who was not prepared for anything. My major was software engineering. I didn’t have talent in this regard, but it’s not that I couldn’t continue to learn, so I didn’t change my major. My biggest gain in college was to meet my wife, and now we have two children.

Later, I worked in 13 companies, of which the longest was more than 3 years and the shortest was 1 month. I often joke that I am a “workplace tourist”. Until March last year, I was very determined to quit the workplace. Until now, I haven’t earned a penny.

I am very glad that I have made the decision not to look for a job, but to create a career that really belongs to my life. Although it seems a little late, I think everything is just right. Real awareness begins slowly until one day it is awakened.

After reading “Retail Philosophy” by the founder of SEVEN-ELEVEN, I really want to open a convenience store; after reading “Pour Your Heart Into It” by Schultz, the founder of Starbucks, I really want to own a cafe; after reading McDonald’s founder Crocker’s “The Entrepreneurial Adventure of the Father of McDonald’s”, I really want to sell Chinese hamburgers…

I have seen the movie “God of Sushi” at least twice, and the words in it inspired me deeply:

“Once you decide on a career, you must devote yourself to your work. You must spend your whole life to hone your skills. This is the secret of success and the key to being respected.” - The movie “The God of Sushi”

The technology we use is not secret. We just keep trying again and again every day. Some people are born with talent, and some people have a sensitive sense of taste and smell. This is the so-called ‘talent’. In this industry, as long as you are serious enough, you will be proficient in craftsmanship. - The movie “The God of Sushi”

Maybe you will ask a question: “Are these the things that you, a colleger, should do?”

In the past, I also thought that it was not appropriate for a talent from Peking University to sell pork. But now I can understand, because I have seen alumni selling fruits to sell SaaS products (a software system charged annually); I have seen classmates as tutors to make growth colleges; I have seen people write official accounts to make media companies…

As long as it is reasonable and legal and valuable to society, it should be done, but it is done differently. This has nothing to do with professional, technical and diploma. As long as you are serious enough, you can become an expert in the industry. This is a kind of cognitive improvement.

When I was a child, I liked to watch a cartoon called “Saint Seiya”, which was the common memory of our post-80s and post-90s generation. Every time the Saint appears in the most critical time, there is a “small universe” to overcome difficulties.

In the year of preparing the second college entrance examination, my own “small universe” also appeared in front of the horizontal bar. So now it appears again, and my 6-square-meter office was the horizontal bar at that time.

Parenting is not about making rockets, but it requires logic, system and principles. What I do is to help you understand the logic of parenting and form your own parenting system, habits and principles.

Every time I add a follower, like and retweet, it is my greatest affirmation, support and encouragement, so that I can continue to improve and contribute value.

Thank you very much to Hankou Bank and the nobles I met along the way.
entry.summary: Today is March 20th, a special day. I opened a business-to-public account in Hankou Bank as a corporate legal person, which means that the one-person company I founded can be operated legally.
